label: swiggy_bangalore_pizza
task: Set the delivery location to any address in Bangalore. Search for 'pizza'. Open the first restaurant in the results. Report the restaurant name, its rating (as shown), and the price of any one pizza on its menu.

label: swiggy_mumbai_biryani
task: Set the delivery location to any address in Mumbai. Search for 'biryani'. Open the first restaurant in the results. Report the restaurant name, its rating (as shown), and the price of any one biryani item on the menu.

label: swiggy_delhi_burger
task: Set the delivery location to any address in Delhi. Search for 'burger'. Open the first restaurant in the results. Report the restaurant name and the price of any burger listed on its menu.

label: swiggy_chennai_dosa
task: Set the delivery location to any address in Chennai. Search for 'dosa'. Open the first restaurant in the results. Report the restaurant name, its rating, and the price of any one dosa item.

label: swiggy_hyderabad_biryani
task: Set the delivery location to any address in Hyderabad. Search for 'biryani'. Open the first restaurant in the results. Report the restaurant name, cuisine type (as shown), and the price of any one menu item.

label: swiggy_pune_dessert
task: Set the delivery location to any address in Pune. Search for 'cake' or 'dessert'. Open the first restaurant in the results. Report the restaurant name and the price of any one item on its menu.

label: swiggy_kolkata_categories
task: Set the delivery location to any address in Kolkata. From the homepage's 'What's on your mind?' or category strip, report the names of the first 5 food categories shown.

label: swiggy_bangalore_offers
task: Set the delivery location to any address in Bangalore. Scroll the homepage to find any 'offers' or 'discount' section. Report the names of the first 3 restaurants or items shown with offer badges (whatever is visible).

label: swiggy_mumbai_top_rated
task: Set the delivery location to any address in Mumbai. From the homepage or the 'All restaurants' page, find a way to view restaurants sorted by rating (filter or sort control). Report the names and ratings of the first 3 restaurants shown.

label: swiggy_haldirams_cart
task: Set the delivery location to any address in Nagpur. Find a Haldiram's restaurant if one is listed for this location. Add any one item from its menu to the cart. Report the item name, its price, and the cart total. Do NOT proceed to checkout.

label: lego_star_wars_first
task: From the LEGO website, navigate to the Star Wars theme browse page (Themes → Star Wars, or via search). Report the name and price of the first product shown on that page.

label: lego_technic_first
task: From the LEGO website, navigate to the Technic theme browse page. Report the name, price, and piece count of the first product shown.

label: lego_city_first
task: From the LEGO website, navigate to the City theme browse page. Report the name and price of the first product shown.

label: lego_harry_potter_first
task: From the LEGO website, navigate to the Harry Potter theme browse page. Report the name, price, and piece count of the first product shown.

label: lego_creator_first

label: lego_search_castle
task: Use the LEGO website's search bar to search for 'castle'. Open the first product result. Report the name, price, and piece count of that set.

label: lego_search_car
task: Use the LEGO website's search to search for 'car'. Open the first product result. Report the name, price, and the theme it belongs to.

label: lego_search_train
task: Use the LEGO website's search to search for 'train'. Open the first product result. Report the name, price, and piece count.

label: lego_new_releases
task: From the LEGO website's main navigation, find the 'New' or 'Latest releases' section. Report the names and prices of the first 3 products listed.

label: lego_offers
task: Find the LEGO website's 'Sale', 'Offers', or 'Promotions' section. Report the names and discounted prices of the first 3 products listed, or report that no offers section is visible.

label: bookmyshow_bangalore_first_movie
task: On BookMyShow Bangalore, find the 'Movies' or 'Now Showing' section. Report the name, language, and certificate (U/UA/A/etc.) of the first movie shown.

label: bookmyshow_mumbai_first_movie
task: On BookMyShow Mumbai, find the 'Movies' or 'Now Showing' section. Report the name, language, certificate, and duration of the first movie shown.

label: bookmyshow_delhi_first_movie
task: On BookMyShow Delhi/NCR, find a movie currently playing. Report the name, language, and certificate of the first movie shown.

label: bookmyshow_chennai_first_movie
task: On BookMyShow Chennai, find any movie currently playing. Report the name and language of the first movie shown.

label: bookmyshow_hyderabad_first_movie

label: bookmyshow_events_mumbai

label: bookmyshow_plays_first

label: bookmyshow_sports_first

label: bookmyshow_languages_filter

label: confirmtkt_delhi_mumbai_first

label: confirmtkt_pune_bangalore_first
task: Search trains from Pune (PUNE) to Bangalore (SBC / KSR Bengaluru) for a journey date 7 days from today. Report the first train's name, number, and departure time from Pune.

label: confirmtkt_delhi_howrah_first
task: Search trains from New Delhi (NDLS) to Howrah (HWH) for a journey date 7 days from today. Report the name and number of the first train shown.

label: confirmtkt_bangalore_chennai_first
task: Search trains from Bangalore (SBC / KSR Bengaluru) to Chennai (MAS / Chennai Central) for a journey date 7 days from today. Report the first train's name, number, and departure time.

label: confirmtkt_class_filter
task: Search trains from New Delhi (NDLS) to Mumbai (BCT or CSMT) for a journey date 7 days from today. On the results page, find the class filter. Report the list of class options shown in the filter (1A, 2A, 3A, SL, etc. — whatever is listed).

label: confirmtkt_bangalore_hyderabad_2a
task: Search trains from Bangalore (SBC) to Hyderabad (HYB or SC — whichever the site uses) for a journey date 7 days from today. Look for any train that has 2A class listed. Report the name, number, and 2A fare of the first such train (if 2A fare is visible).

task: Search buses from Bangalore to Chennai for a journey date 7 days from today. Report the operator name and fare of the first bus listed in the results.

label: redbus_hyderabad_bangalore_first

label: redbus_chennai_bangalore_first
task: Search buses from Chennai to Bangalore for a journey date 7 days from today. Report the operator name and fare of the first bus listed.

label: redbus_pune_goa_count
task: Search buses from Pune to Goa (Madgaon or Panaji — whichever the site offers) for a journey date 7 days from today. Report the total number of buses listed in the results.

label: redbus_delhi_manali_lowest

label: redbus_blr_chn_types

task: On the redbus.in homepage, find any offers or discounts section. Report the descriptions or coupon codes of the first 3 offers listed. If no offers section is visible, report that finding instead.

task: Search one-way flights from Bangalore (BLR) to Delhi (DEL) for a departure date 7 days from today, 1 adult, Economy. Report the airline, flight number, and total fare of the first flight listed.

label: gemini_login_state
task: Open Gemini's web interface. Determine whether the page is showing a logged-in chat experience or a sign-in / landing page. If sign-in is required, report exactly what the call-to-action button says (e.g., 'Sign in', 'Try Gemini'). If already logged in, report the model name shown in the model picker dropdown at the top.

label: gemini_model_picker
task: Open Gemini's web interface. If logged in, click the model picker dropdown at the top. Report all model options shown. If not logged in, report what the landing page shows instead.

label: gemini_sidebar_recent
task: Open Gemini's web interface. Check the left sidebar. Report whether the sidebar shows previous chat history. If yes, report the title of the first chat shown. If not (sign-in required or empty history), describe what's shown instead.

label: gemini_settings_menu
task: Open Gemini's web interface. Find and click the settings / menu icon (usually a gear or three-dot icon). Report all the menu items shown in the settings dropdown or page.

label: gemini_new_chat
task: Open Gemini's web interface. Find the 'New chat' or '+' button that starts a new conversation. Report the exact button text and approximately where it appears on the page (e.g., top-left of sidebar).

label: gemini_suggestions
task: Open Gemini's web interface. If logged in and the homepage shows any suggested prompts or starter prompts, report the first 3 suggested prompts shown. If none are visible, describe what's shown above the chat input instead.

label: gemini_apps_extensions
task: Open Gemini's web interface. Look for an 'Apps', 'Extensions', or 'Connected apps' option in settings or sidebar. Report the list of apps/extensions available if such a list is found. If not, report that the option could not be located.

label: gemini_dark_mode
task: Open Gemini's web interface. Find the theme / dark mode toggle (usually inside settings). Report its current state (light / dark / system) and the available options.

label: gemini_input_placeholder
task: Open Gemini's web interface. Find the chat input box. Report the exact placeholder text shown inside the input box (e.g., 'Ask Gemini', 'Enter a prompt here'). Do NOT type anything.

label: gemini_help_link
task: Open Gemini's web interface. Find a 'Help' or 'Support' link or icon. Report the link's URL or the page title it leads to when clicked. Do NOT submit any help form.

label: wikipedia_einstein
task: Use the Wikipedia search bar to search for 'Albert Einstein'. Open the article. From the infobox on the right side of the article, report Einstein's date of birth, place of birth, date of death, and place of death.

label: wikipedia_gandhi
task: Search Wikipedia for 'Mahatma Gandhi'. Open the article. From the infobox, report his date of birth, place of birth, date of death, and place of death.

label: wikipedia_apollo11
task: Search Wikipedia for 'Apollo 11'. Open the article. Report from the infobox: launch date, mission duration, and the names of the three astronauts on the crew.

label: wikipedia_python_lang
task: Search Wikipedia for 'Python (programming language)'. Open the article. From the infobox, report the original designer, the year it first appeared, and the latest stable release (whatever is shown there).

label: wikipedia_taj_mahal
task: Search Wikipedia for 'Taj Mahal'. Open the article. From the infobox or the lead paragraph, report the location (city, country), the year construction was completed, and who commissioned it.

label: wikipedia_eiffel_tower
task: Search Wikipedia for 'Eiffel Tower'. Open the article. From the infobox, report the location (city, country), its completion year, and its total height.

label: wikipedia_mumbai_lead
task: Search Wikipedia for 'Mumbai'. Open the article. Report the first paragraph of the article (the lead paragraph, before any section heading).

label: wikipedia_bangalore_lead
task: Search Wikipedia for 'Bangalore' (the article may redirect to 'Bengaluru'). Open the article. Report the first paragraph of the lead section.

label: wikipedia_main_page_featured
task: Open Wikipedia's main page. Find the 'Today's featured article' section. Report the title of the featured article and the first sentence of its summary shown on the main page.

label: wikipedia_did_you_know
task: Open Wikipedia's main page. Find the 'Did you know...' section. Report the first 3 bullet points listed in that section.

label: github_anthropics_claude_code
task: Use GitHub's top-bar search to search for 'anthropics/claude-code'. Open the top matching result (owner 'anthropics', repo 'claude-code'). From the repository page, report the star count (as shown), the fork count, and the primary language listed in the right sidebar's 'Languages' section.

label: github_python_cpython
task: Use GitHub's search to find 'python/cpython'. Open the repository. Report the star count, the primary language, and the latest release tag (from the 'Releases' section in the right sidebar).

label: github_microsoft_vscode
task: Use GitHub's search to find 'microsoft/vscode'. Open the repository. Report the star count, the fork count, and the primary language.

label: github_vercel_nextjs
task: Use GitHub's search to find 'vercel/next.js'. Open the repository. Report the star count and the primary language.

label: github_facebook_react
task: Use GitHub's search to find 'facebook/react'. Open the repository. Report the star count, the fork count, and the license name (from the right sidebar's 'About' or 'License' section).

label: github_trending_top3
task: Open GitHub's Trending page. Report the names (in owner/repo format) of the first 3 trending repositories shown for today (default filter).

label: github_explore_topics
task: Open GitHub's Explore page. Find any topics or trending topics section. Report the first 5 topic names shown.

label: github_cpython_readme
task: Open the GitHub repository at github.com/python/cpython. Scroll to the README section. Report the first paragraph (or first 3 sentences) of the README content.

label: github_claude_code_issues
task: Open the GitHub repository at github.com/anthropics/claude-code. Click the 'Issues' tab. Report the open-issues count shown and the title of the first issue listed.

label: github_search_browser_use
task: Use GitHub's search to search for 'browser-use'. Switch to the 'Repositories' tab if not already there. Report the names (in owner/repo format) of the first 3 repository results.

label: amazon_headphones
task: Use the Amazon.in search bar to search for 'headphones'. Open the first product result that appears to be a real product listing (skip clearly sponsored ads if you can; otherwise open the first result regardless). Report the product title, current price (the discounted price, in INR), and the average customer star rating.

label: amazon_book
task: Use the Amazon.in search bar to search for 'book'. Open the first product result. Report the title, the author (if visible), and the current price.

label: amazon_smartphone
task: Use the Amazon.in search bar to search for 'smartphone'. Open the first product result that appears to be a phone (skip sponsored accessory listings if possible). Report the product title, current price, and average rating.

label: amazon_kindle
task: Use the Amazon.in search bar to search for 'kindle'. Open the first product result that is an actual Kindle device (not an accessory). Report the title and the current price.

task: Use the Amazon.in search bar to search for 'laptop'. Open the first product result that appears to be a laptop. Report the title and the current price.

label: amazon_shoes
task: Use the Amazon.in search bar to search for 'shoes'. Open the first product result. Report the title, the current price, and the average rating.

label: amazon_speaker
task: Use the Amazon.in search bar to search for 'speaker'. Open the first product result that is a speaker (skip clearly sponsored or accessory listings if possible). Report the title, current price, and the total number of customer ratings.

task: On the Amazon.in homepage, find the top categories navigation strip (usually below the search bar or in a horizontal scroll near the top). Report the names of the first 5 category items shown.

task: Search 'bookshelf' on Amazon India. Apply a price filter of ₹2000 or below if available. Open the first result. Report its title, price (₹), and average rating.

label: swiggy_pizza_first_restaurant_menu
task: Set the delivery location to any Bangalore address on Swiggy. Search for 'pizza'. Open the first restaurant. From its menu, find any 'Margherita' (or first pizza item if no Margherita). Report the restaurant name, the pizza name, and its price (₹).

task: On LEGO India, navigate to the Star Wars theme. Open the first product card. Report its product code, name, and price (₹). Do not actually checkout — just inspect the product page.
